title: Windchill: Introduction and Context Administration
description: Configure Windchill to work with your enterprise's product development process. Identify contexts and their relationships, create and manage organizations, products, and libraries, build context templates, and control system behavior.

modules.title: Business Administration Introduction
modules.description: Identify business administrator responsibilities and configuration drivers. Understand policies, processes, participants, and the Windchill system architecture.

modules.title: Contexts
modules.description: Compare context types and their hierarchy. Create organizations, products, libraries, and folders. Assign context creators and manage objects within application contexts.

modules.title: Context Templates
modules.description: Understand template types and their benefits. Create product context templates, document templates, and CAD document templates to standardize configuration.

modules.title: System Behavior
modules.description: Configure the Windchill Home page, manage calendars and task delegation, and set preferences and properties to control system behavior across contexts.
